payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Financial transaction ledger recording customer advance payments against structured order volumes

order_id.description: Reference ID linking to the associated client furniture order

total_amount.description: The complete gross pricing valuation agreed with client

balance_due.description: Outstanding amount calculated automatically as total minus advance

payment_date.description: Vetted date stamp of received payment

notes.description: Administrative notes and reference serials of the payments

created_by.description: Admin staff key who logged payments record

created_at.description: UTC timestamp of payments ledger creation

/payments/{paymentId}.description: Ledger directory storing advance deposit balances and structural prices per order
